cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure this out. The question is asking about the student's description of the illness. The options are whether it was not correct, not satisfying, completely discouraging, or accepted. From the passage: The story says that the student was required to describe a certain illness, and his description "turned out to be OK." Then, when the professor asked about the cure, the student answered "just as right." So both parts were correct. However, when the student gave the dosage as a full spoon, the professor made him leave, and after the student realized his mistake and corrected it to five drops, the professor said it was too late because the patient had died. So the question is about the description of the illness. The passage says it was OK, so that would mean it was acceptable.
